overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through ancient Alexandria. The character moves from a residential street into a narrow walled passage and finally emerges into a grand plaza with monumental Greco-Egyptian architecture, palm trees, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with classical temple view

events.description: turns right from open street into narrower walled passage

agents.ego_description: walking through residential district carrying shield and weapons, approaching narrow alley entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in robes walking away from camera toward the temple

entered.detail: large classical building with columns and pediment at end of street
tall palm tree with green fronds against sky
two-story stone building with balcony and greenery
ornate carved stone wall with planters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit residential street in ancient Alexandria with a grand temple visible in the distance. The protagonist walks forward, passing classical stone buildings and palm trees before turning right into a narrow walled passage at the end of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walled street with climbing vegetation

events.description: camel rider passes by on the left side of the narrow street
approaching end of narrow passage, light increases as plaza opens ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow stone passage flanked by high walls covered in ivy

notable_agents.action: rider on camel moving in same direction then passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall stone wall covered in dense green ivy and red flowering vines
smooth stone wall with decorative carved capitals
dark fabric banner hanging from building facade
tall stone obelisk visible at end of passage

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow, winding street enclosed by high stone walls covered in lush vegetation. A camel rider passes by on the left, and the distant obelisk marks the approach to a more open area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand plaza with monumental architecture and sphinx

events.description: exits narrow passage into grand plaza with colonnaded palace and sphinx statue

agents.ego_description: entering the grand plaza, observing the monumental architecture and sphinx statue while walking

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white robes walking across the plaza toward the palace

entered.detail: massive multi-story palace with blue painted columns and golden accents
large stone sphinx statue on pedestal with fountain base
tall blue-painted columns with gold capitals lining the palace facade
wooden market stall with yellow awning and goods displayed

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a magnificent sunlit plaza dominated by a grand palace with blue columns and a massive sphinx statue. The character explores the area, passing by market stalls and pedestrians while approaching the monumental architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright residential street through a secluded corridor and into a monumental urban plaza. It begins by following the protagonist past classical stone buildings and palm trees under a clear sky, moving toward a grand temple visible in the distance before turning right into a narrow walled passage. As the camera proceeds through this winding corridor, the open sunlight is replaced by high stone walls draped in lush vegetation, passing a camel rider while a distant obelisk signals the end of the enclosure. The scene then expands abruptly as the character emerges from the passage into a magnificent sunlit plaza dominated by a grand palace with blue columns and a massive sphinx statue. Finally, the camera glides through the open square, passing market stalls and pedestrians as it approaches the towering Greco-Egyptian architecture.
